article.title: Seth Troxler: A Young Voice in Techno
article.subtitle: Detroit Roots and Berlin Influence Shape a Distinctive Sound
article.author: A. Stern
article.excerpt: Seth Troxler's achievements far outweigh his tender age of 22. His Detroit roots are unmistakable and his recent relocation to Berlin has already earned him a place in the elite of the European techno scene.

content.text: Seth Troxler stands out as a young yet accomplished figure in the techno scene. Despite his age of 22, his achievements are significant and his sound is already well-defined.

His musical influences are eclectic, ranging from the chirping of crickets to the whirring of space ships and the sweet sounds of whistling voodoo magic. These diverse inspirations contribute to his distinctive approach to techno.

Troxler's Detroit roots are evident in his work, and his recent move to Berlin has further solidified his position within the European techno elite. His sound is often described as a blend of minimal and techno elements.

With releases on respected labels such as Spectral, Wagon Repair, and M_NUS, Troxler has built a strong discography that showcases his evolving style. His work is characterized by a careful balance of minimal textures and driving techno rhythms.

Recent releases including This Is Then, DJ-Kicks (Seth Troxler) [DJ Mix], Mixmag Presents Seth Troxler: The Illusion Nouveau (DJ Mix), Mixmag Presents Jamie Jones vs. Seth Troxler, and Love Never Sleeps demonstrate his range and depth as a producer and DJ.
